                                    return t.key === key;\n
                                });\n
                            }\n
            \n
                            function loadKeys() {\n
                                try {\n
                                    const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);\n
                                    const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];\n
            \n
                                    return Array.isArray(parsed)\n
                                        ? parsed.filter(function (k) {\n

                                          })\n
                                        : [];\n
                                } catch (e) {\n
                                    return [];\n
                                }\n
                            }\n
            \n
                            function saveKeys(keys) {\n
                                localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(keys));\n
                            }\n
            \n
                            function recordVisit(key) {\n
                                if (!key) {\n
                                    return;\n
                                }\n
            \n
                                let keys = loadKeys().filter(function (k) {\n
                                    return k !== key;\n
                                });\n
            \n
                                keys.push(key);\n
            \n
                                if (keys.length > MAX_TABS) {\n
                                    keys = keys.slice(keys.length - MAX_TABS);\n
                                }\n
            \n
                                saveKeys(keys);\n
                            }\n

                            function render() {\n
                                root.innerHTML = '';\n
                                const keys = loadKeys().filter(function (k) {\n
                                    return tabByKey(k);\n
                                });\n

                                    a.className =\n
                                        'min-w-0 flex-1 truncate px-3 py-1.5 ' +\n

            \n
                            function loadKeys() {\n

                    ></div>\n
            \n
                    <script>\n
                        (function initSellerWorkspaceRecentTabs(cfg) {\n
                            const root = document.getElementById('seller-workspace-tabs-root');\n
            \n
                            if (!root || !cfg || !Array.isArray(cfg.tabs)) {\n
                                return;\n
                            }\n
            \n
                            const STORAGE_KEY = 'admin_seller_workspace_recent_v1';\n
                            const MAX_TABS = 20;\n
            \n
                            function tabByKey(key) {\n
                                return cfg.tabs.find(function (t) {\n
                                    return t.key === key;\n
                                });\n
                            }\n
            \n
                            function loadKeys() {\n
                                try {\n
                                    const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);\n
                                    const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];\n
            \n
                                    return Array.isArray(parsed)\n
                                        ? parsed.filter(function (k) {\n
                                              return typeof k === 'string';\n
                                          })\n
                                        : [];\n
                                } catch (e) {\n
                                    return [];\n
                                }\n
                            }\n
            \n
                            function saveKeys(keys) {\n
                                localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(keys));\n
                            }\n
            \n
                            function recordVisit(key) {\n
                                if (!key) {\n
                                    return;\n
                                }\n
            \n
                                let keys = loadKeys().filter(function (k) {\n
                                    return k !== key;\n
                                });\n
            \n
